emails.subject: FW: Devon SFS deal #679736
emails.body: FW: Devon SFS deal #679736 Gerald, Can you or anyone else who will be working on ENA Upstream contracts let me know if you get any future requests for confirmations or contracts that are for ENA Upstream? All of the purchase deals from the Originations or Mid-marketers for ENA Upstream going forward should be on the Committed Reserves confirmations and that usually does not get communicated so it can be put on the appropriate confirm/contract. Let me know if you have any questions. Thanks, Judy Thorne To: Thorne, Judy

emails.subject: RE: Devon SFS deal #679736
emails.body: RE: Devon SFS deal #679736 This deal was done some time ago. I assume that all ENA Upstream deal makers going forward know they should be going through you. To: Nemec, Gerald

emails.subject: RE: Devon SFS deal #679736
emails.body: I thought that might be what happened. I just wanted to make sure the cracks in the process are all plugged. Thanks for all of your help. Judy To: Thorne, Judy
